**Image of Arundel**
[Image of Arundel, England, UK]

The caption mentions the name of the town, Arundel, and its country, England. The town is located in West Sussex, England, UK. The order of the location is 1, as it is the first location mentioned in the caption.

The caption also mentions Castle Arundel, which is the most important reason for visiting Arundel. Castle Arundel is a medieval castle located in Arundel, West Sussex, England. The castle was established by Roger de Montgomery in the 11th century and has been owned by the Dukes of Norfolk since the 15th century. The castle is open to the public for tours and events.
